tasks.intent:
Set up search filters for private seller boats near Miami.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Zip code input field: SMALL white text box in LEFT sidebar around coordinates (78, 451)
- Distance dropdown: SMALL dropdown in LEFT sidebar around coordinates (85, 535)
- Price filter: WHITE input boxes in LEFT sidebar for minimum price
- Seller type filter: CHECKBOX or dropdown labeled 'Private Seller' in LEFT sidebar
- Sort dropdown: DROPDOWN in TOP RIGHT area around coordinates (1165, 464)

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Blue promotional banners across TOP of page (y coordinates 158-188)
- Featured badges on listing cards (SMALL colored rectangles 40px wide)
- Social media icons in footer (SMALL colored squares 20-40px)
- Advertisement banners (LARGE rectangular areas with promotional text)

STEPS:
1. click(78, 451) to select zip code field
2. type_text('33101')
3. click(85, 535) to open distance dropdown
4. Find and click '25 miles' option
5. Locate minimum price filter and click()
6. type_text('35000')
7. Find 'Seller Type' filter and select 'Private Seller'
8. click(1165, 464) to open sort dropdown
9. Find and click 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest First'
10. done(success=true, summary='FILTERS_SET | Zip: 33101, Distance: 25mi, Min Price: 35000, Private Seller, Sort: Recent')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- If page doesn't load → scroll(direction='down', amount=3), retry filter setup
- If zip code invalid → clear field, type_text('33101') again
- If filter not found → scroll(direction='down', amount=2) in sidebar area
- Cookie popup → click Accept button ONCE, max 2 steps

Extract boat listing data from private seller listings, avoiding photo galleries and dealer links.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Listing title text: BOTTOM portion of listing cards (y coordinates 696-720), NOT the photo area
- Card 1 title area: coordinates around (491, 708)
- Card 2 title area: coordinates around (791, 708)
- Card 3 title area: coordinates around (1091, 708)
- Contact information buttons: RECTANGULAR buttons labeled 'Contact Seller' around (1150, 242)

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Photo areas: TOP portion of listing cards (y coordinates 505-696)
- Featured badges: SMALL colored rectangles (coordinates like 359,516 to 398,526)
- Gallery thumbnails: HORIZONTAL row of small photos (y coordinates 307-421)
- Main hero photos: LARGE photo areas (coordinates 21,143 to 876,298)
- Dealer logos: SQUARE logo areas in contact sections
- Ad banners: LARGE rectangular promotional areas (coordinates like 84,444 to 813,535)
- Social media icons: SMALL colored squares in footer/contact areas

STEPS:
1. Identify listing cards on page (LARGE rectangles with boat photo + text)
2. For each listing card, click ONLY the title text area at BOTTOM (y>696)
3. Wait for detail page to load
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=3) to see description area
5. Look for phone numbers: (XXX)XXX-XXXX, XXX-XXX-XXXX, or 10+ digit sequences
6. IGNORE: prices ($XX,XXX), years (19XX, 20XX), zip codes (XXXXX), partial numbers
7. If phone found, extract: year, make, model, asking price, boat type, seller phone, seller name
8. Copy URL from address bar
9. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to results
10. Repeat for next listing
11. If bottom of page reached, look for 'Next' pagination button
12. done(success=true, summary='LISTINGS_PROCESSED | Count: X, Leads: Y')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Photo gallery opens (see 'X of Y' counter) → key_press(keys='Escape'), key_press(keys='alt+left')
- 404/Page Not Found → key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(summary='SKIPPED | 404')
- Off-site redirect (facebook/instagram URL) → key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- No phone number found → key_press(keys='alt+left'), continue to next listing
- Cookie popup → click Accept ONCE, max 2 steps

OUTPUT FORMAT — use done() with EXACTLY this format:
done(success=true, summary="VIABLE | Year: 2024 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: Sundancer | Price: $189000 | Phone: 786-555-1234 | Type: Express Cruiser | URL: https://www.boattrader.com/boat/...")
If no phone found, still report VIABLE with Phone: none.
If error/blank page: done(success=true, summary="SKIPPED | reason")
If no more listings: done(success=false, summary="no more listings")

loop.pagination_intent: Look for 'Next' button or page numbers at BOTTOM of results page. Click NEXT button to continue to more listings. Stop when no more Next button appears.
